ip_rights_status: Oficio Taller retains all intellectual property rights to architectural designs per standard contract clause. Client receives license to build the approved design at the specified site only.
advisory_notes: Los Cabos is a federal zone municipality — confirm SEMARNAT clearance before permit submission to avoid construction stoppage.

Contract should include a budget alignment clause noting that construction cost estimates are preliminary and subject to contractor bidding — particularly given the stated budget vs. program scope gap.
RFC provided (TEST-RFC-006) — confirm valid Mexican RFC before CFDI issuance at project close.
